\documentclass{amsart}
\usepackage{amsmath,amsthm}

\newtheorem{lemma}{Lemma}[section]
\newtheorem{theorem}[lemma]{Theorem}

\begin{document}

\section{Duplicate labels}

\begin{lemma}\label{lem:shared}
First definition should own the shared label.
\end{lemma}

\begin{lemma}\label{lem:shared}
Second definition reuses the shared label.
\end{lemma}

\begin{theorem}\label{thm:uses-shared}
By Lemma \ref{lem:shared}, the claim follows.
\end{theorem}

\end{document}
